vocab.prompting: Describe the feature and its UI in concrete terms. Mention component names if they exist.
vocab.stack: Bolt defaults to React + Vite + Tailwind. Specify if you need a different stack upfront.
vocab.iteration: Use targeted feedback: 'the submit button should be full-width on mobile'. Avoid vague: 'make it better'.
vocab.workflow: Build in Bolt → export to GitHub → continue in a local editor for production work.
vocab.deployment: One-click deploy to Netlify from the Bolt interface. Custom domain via Netlify settings.
